profile.name: Stephine Hubert Campos
profile.title: Licensed Electronics Engineer
profile.headline: Cisco Networking Academy Instructor • Aspiring Network Engineer • IT Infrastructure • System Integrator

careerObjective: Licensed Electronics Engineer with nearly eight years of experience in engineering education and Cisco Networking Academy instruction. Seeking opportunities in Network Engineering, System Integration, IT Infrastructure, and Network Operations where I can contribute to enterprise networking projects while continuously expanding my technical expertise.

responsibilities: Teach Computer Engineering, Electronics Engineering, and Industrial Engineering courses.
Develop networking laboratory activities using Cisco Packet Tracer.
Prepare engineering laboratory manuals and technical documentation.
Mentor students in networking and engineering capstone projects.
Deliver ITN, SRWE, and ENSA courses.
Develop enterprise networking laboratories and troubleshooting exercises.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Electronics Engineering
